scripts.dev:with-frontend-build: npm --prefix ../frontend run build && npm run dev
scripts.db:local: wrangler d1 execute booking-prod --local --persist-to ../.wrangler/state --config ../wrangler.toml --file ../db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute booking-prod --local --persist-to ../.wrangler/state --config ../wrangler.toml --file ../db/migrations/002_tenant_last_changed.sql && wrangler d1 execute booking-prod --local --persist-to ../.wrangler/state --config ../wrangler.toml --file ../db/seed.sql
